cortical implant

Technology / Ship · First seen 3308-06-10 · 2 mentions
Active: 3308-06-10 → 3311-06-03
Technical Overview

cortical implant is a technology in the Elite Dangerous universe, mentioned from 3308-06-10 to 3311-06-03. Developed or used by Aegis, Alba Tesreau, Seo Jin-ae.

Project Seraph
Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3311-06-03
Aegis Confirms Seo Jin-ae 'Hiatus' from Advisory Role
Aegis confirms that special advisor Seo Jin-ae has taken a hiatus from her duties. Seo, the sole survivor of Project Seraph's 197 test subjects, reveals her intent to find and shut down Salvation, whom she believes exists beyond physical death in HIP 22460.
3310-10-24
Seo Jin-ae Awake, Releases Unauthorised Warning
Seo Jin-ae wakes from a week-long coma and releases an unauthorised ICE-cast statement revealing that the Thargoids deliberately probed her mind through her cortical implant, learning everything she knows about humanity.
3310-10-21
Torben Rademaker Demands ‘Disconnection’ of Seo Jin-ae
Azimuth Biotech CEO Torben Rademaker demands Aegis 'disconnect' Seo Jin-ae from the Thargoid hive mind by any means necessary, claiming her link is a danger humanity cannot permit.
3310-10-18
'Significant Medical Emergency’ Strikes Seo Jin-ae
Aegis special advisor Seo Jin-ae suffers a violent seizure and falls into a coma at a medical facility in Duamta, with Aegis Head Alba Tesreau confirming the incident and revealing Seo's incredibly high brain activity while unconscious.
3308-06-10
Project Seraph Victim Seeks Revenge
A survivor of Azimuth Biochemicals' Project Seraph, designated D-2, reveals the location of an INRA base and confirms Salvation's identity as Dr Caleb Wycherley. Professor Alba Tesreau publishes the survivor's testimony about horrific human-Thargoid interface experiments at Oaken Point.
